notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras grounds into a double play, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Ty France. Jarren Duran out at 2nd. Willson Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio grounds into a force out, pitcher Adrian Morejon to second baseman Jake Cronenworth. Ceddanne Rafaela scores. Roman Anthony out at 2nd. Andruw Monasterio to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Ramón Laureano singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony. Fernando Tatis Jr. scores. Ramón Laureano to 3rd. Ramón Laureano advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by left fielder Roman Anthony.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ramón Laureano singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony. Fernando Tatis Jr. scores. Ramón Laureano to 3rd. Ramón Laureano advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by left fielder Roman Anthony.

notableEvents.label: Nick Castellanos pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Castellanos strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Ramón Laureano singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony. Fernando Tatis Jr. scores. Ramón Laureano to 3rd. Ramón Laureano advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by left fielder Roman Anthony.
